title: gelseminum azaleiflorum
intro: Gelseminum azaleiflorum, also known as Yellow Staphisagria, is a perennial plant species in the Gentianaceae family, native to China and other parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids such as gelsemine and gelsemoidine. The health benefits of Gelseminum azaleiflorum include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to treat skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Gelseminum azaleiflorum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although caution is advised due to its potential toxicity and side effects.
